## Privacy impact

- [ ] Level 0: Public
- [ ] Level 1: Low-risk app data
- [ ] Level 2: Contextual private data
- [ ] Level 3: Highly private data
- [ ] Level 4: Restricted sensitive data

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_repo_structure.py`
- [ ] `cd ios && swift test`
- [ ] `cd ios && swift build`

Validation notes:

## Screenshots / diagrams

Attach only synthetic examples. Do not include real private data.

## Out of scope

What should reviewers intentionally not expect from this PR?

## Checklist

- [ ] I used synthetic data only.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, `.env`, signing files, model weights or private logs.
- [ ] I kept the change small and reviewable.
- [ ] I updated docs/tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I followed brand/logo rules if this touches visuals.
